mist_cycles.source: measurement:mist_event (each row = 1 rising edge). Litres per cycle not yet calibrated.

electricity.source: measurement:power_consumption (Meross MSS310, trapezoidal integral over the period since the daemon came up 2026-02-18 — ~59 d, not the full `since→as_of` window). Polling cadence varied 2 s — 30 s — 120 s across the window; trapezoidal integral is density-independent, so the kWh figure is unaffected.
electricity.note: Verified 2026-04-18 against raw distribution: mean 109.9 W, median 110.7 W, p95 202.6 W, max 492.9 W. Hour-of-day profile: night 60–90 W (compressor+base), midday peak 170–180 W (lights peak, occasional compressor overlap). Meross meters the whole highland power strip — compressor, 4× ChilLED pucks, fans, Pi, ESP sensors, mister pump — no known devices are unmetered. 2.6 kWh/day is real, not an artefact.

fog_hours.note: Approximated as count(humidity >= threshold) × 60s / 3600. Data Logger period is 60 s for continuous measurements.

caveats.note: InfluxDB retention is 1 year; `since` is the earliest record present, not the date the hardware was first turned on (~late 2022). Counters below cover the window `since → as_of` only.
